meaning: n.少女,爱人,情妇,<苏格兰>女佣
examples: Anne is a Lancashire lass from Longton, near Preston.
It was a good thing that little lass came to th' Manor.
Tha'lt be like a blush rose when tha' grows up, my little lass, bless thee.
Male Chorus: (Singing) It was a lover and his lass, that o'er the green cornfield did pass.
For all concerned it will be best if Isaac veers east and picks up lass steam.
